summary: The crude birth rate of 20 means approximately 1 out of every 50 pregnancies results in a live birth; thus, around 100 pregnant women would need to register at the sub-center to expect about 20 live births annually. To meet this specific target more precisely requires careful tracking but generally suggests needing roughly one-fifth of all expected deliveries over time based on current rates observed clinically
